events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need respond with raw JSON only. Need assess scenario: "milkshake oil cap (FD)" in automotive fluids & leaks. Milkshake oil cap means oil cap has creamy emulsion (water/coolant mixed with oil), indicating head gasket leak or coolant intrusion into oil. Component/material/condition involved: oil fill cap / engine oil / coolant contamination. Condition installed-defective likely. Stage rough-complete. Decision fail because non-compliant, potential engine damage, dangerous? It's dangerous or non-compliant? The task says if work is dangerous or non-compliant, decision must be fail. This is a defect. Risk high or critical? Engine damage, coolant mixing with oil, potential bearing failure; but observed at rough-complete, before service. Could be critical because operating engine with contaminated oil can cause catastrophic failure. But as condition on production floor: a powertrain assembly with milkshake oil cap indicates internal leak (head gasket, cracked block/cylinder head, condensation?). Risk high. Maybe critical? Need decide. Confidence high. Findings: oil filler cap contaminated with milky tan emulsion; coolant intrusion into crankcase; possible head gasket/cylinder head defect. Actions: isolate unit, drain oil, inspect cooling system, pressure test, identify source (head gasket, intake gasket, cracked component), repair/replace engine or gasket, refill with correct fluids per OEM. References: OEM specs; maybe SAE/AAMA standards? Just OEM specs. Value maybe 0. Percent complete maybe 90 (rough-complete). Event time etc irrelevant. Let's craft JSON.
